# PieMinder

> PieMinder is a free, ad-free, privacy-first pizza dough calculator for home bakers, available as an iOS app and a web app. Enter your pizza count, size, thickness, and hydration to get exact ingredient amounts (flour, water, salt, yeast, olive oil, sugar) in grams and ounces, with a guided step-by-step walkthrough and Dynamic Island proofing timers.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://luckyducks.app/pieminder/): Overview of PieMinder Pro, features, and download links.
- [Web calculator](https://luckyducks.app/pieminder/app/): The free browser-based pizza dough calculator — real-time ingredient amounts from your pizza size, quantity, and thickness.
- [Support & FAQ](https://luckyducks.app/pieminder/support.html): How hydration and baker's percentages work, gluten-free mode, sharing recipes, and troubleshooting.
- [Privacy policy](https://luckyducks.app/pieminder/privacy.html): PieMinder collects no data, uses no analytics or tracking, and shows no ads.

## Key facts
- Platforms: iOS app (App Store id 6777173101) and web app.
- Price: Free. Optional in-app tip jar ($1–$5); no features are gated behind it.
- Privacy: No data collection, no analytics, no tracking, no ads. Settings stored locally on device.
- Default dough: 65% hydration; gluten-free mode defaults to 75% hydration.
- Made by Dakota Holiman.

## Contact
- Email: support@luckyducks.app
